children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read and parse input data from source into raw_data store
children.behavior: Accepts input JSON, extracts source, reads data, parses it, and writes to raw_data store. Logs the operation.
postconditions: raw_data store populated with ingested records

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: writes parsed data to raw_data store

outputs.name: ingest_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records count

global_vars.description: writes parsed data to raw_data store

data_operations.description: writes parsed data to raw_data store

constraints.description: raw_data must be initialized before write

acceptance_criteria.description: raw_data store contains ingested records after execution

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformations to data in raw_data and write to processed_data
children.behavior: Reads from raw_data, applies transformation rules (e.g., mapping, cleaning), writes transformed records to processed_data. Logs the operation.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: reads data from raw_data for transformation

outputs.name: transform_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records transformed

global_vars.description: reads data from raw_data for transformation

data_operations.description: reads data from raw_data for transformation

constraints.description: raw_data must be populated before read
processed_data must be initialized before write

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data store contains transformed records after execution

children.name: ValidateQuality
children.purpose: Check quality of transformed data and mark valid/invalid records
children.behavior: Reads from processed_data, applies validation rules (e.g., schema, range), updates processed_data with validity flags. Logs the operation.
postconditions: processed_data store has validity flags set

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: reads data for validation and updates with validity flags

outputs.name: validate_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, valid count, invalid count

global_vars.description: reads data for validation and updates with validity flags

data_operations.description: reads data for validation and updates with validity flags

constraints.description: processed_data must be populated before read

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data store has validity flags set after execution

children.name: ExportResults
children.purpose: Export only valid records from processed_data to output
children.behavior: Reads from processed_data, filters for valid records, formats output JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data. Logs the operation.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: reads processed_data to filter valid records

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

global_vars.description: reads processed_data to filter valid records

data_operations.description: reads processed_data to filter valid records

constraints.description: processed_data must have validity flags set before read

acceptance_criteria.description: output contains only valid records from processed_data

governance_notes: All children have been assigned governance and resource fields based on their internal_leaf_accesses. global_vars and data_operations are synchronized for each child. No Stage 1 or Stage 2 fields were modified. The resource audit confirms full coverage and synchronization.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures remain unchanged from Stage 2: IngestData(input: dict) -> dict, TransformData(transform_trigger: dict) -> dict, ValidateQuality(validate_trigger: dict) -> dict, ExportResults(export_trigger: dict) -> dict. No resource names appear in signatures.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: Each child's internal_leaf_accesses map directly to its data_operations and global_vars. IngestData: raw_data write. TransformData: raw_data read, processed_data write. ValidateQuality: processed_data read_write. ExportResults: processed_data read.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each child, global_vars and data_operations contain identical entries (same resource, same op, same description). No exceptions needed.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources (raw_data, processed_data) and all operations (read, write, read_write) from internal_leaf_accesses are covered in global_vars and data_operations. No missing entries.
